summary: Lead quality strategy reducing production incidents by 40%. Pioneered AI-augmented testing with LLMs and CrewAI agents, cutting test design time by 35%. Optimized CI/CD pipelines reducing infrastructure costs by 50%.

Led squad of 7 QAs across 3 product teams. Architected device farm for POS testing reducing manual validation by 60%. Integrated static security analysis (SonarQube, MobSF) catching 90% of critical vulnerabilities pre-merge.
Optimized CI/CD pipelines and restructured test automation strategy. Reduced infrastructure costs by 50% while accelerating feedback loops and increasing test reliability.
Ensured quality for high-volume payment products in regulated fintech environment. Streamlined QA processes aligning manual and automated testing with Agile delivery.
Technical QA leadership for digital media projects. Built automation frameworks using Ruby, Cucumber, Appium integrated with Jenkins CI. Championed Specification by Example practices.
Executed functional testing and introduced automation in regulated banking environment. Operationalized IBM Rational tools (RTC, RQM, RFT) for requirements traceability.
QA audits, AI testing workshops, and technical mentorship. Open to remote-first global roles or Japan relocation with visa sponsorship.
